mapper.select: select rp.id as push_id, cr.id as resource_id, cr.title, cr.category, cr.file_url, cr.file_name, cr.file_type, rp.reason, rp.status, rp.created_at from recommendation_push rp join course_resource cr on cr.id = rp.resource_id where rp.student_id = #{studentId} and rp.course_id = #{courseId} and cr.status = 1 order by rp.created_at desc
